title: Thai Piquant Fish Noodle Soup
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai-inspired noodle soup made with fish, piquant sauce, and fresh herbs.

ingredients.name: Piquant sauce
ingredients.notes: Thai red curry paste or store-bought

ingredients.name: Thai noodles (rice stick or egg noodles)

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onion and ginger, cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add piquant sauce and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add fish, cook until opaque and flaky, about 3-4 minutes.
Add noodles and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the noodles are heated through.
Garnish with Thai basil and serve hot.
Optional: add fish sauce and stir to combine.
